title: deer-flow.research.session v1
description: Emitted by deer-flow's start_run() (backend/app/gateway/services.py) when a new agent run is created, on the internal deer-flow bus (documented in backend/.deer-flow/threads/.../deer-flow-chat-message-flow.md as 'deer-flow.research.session (thread_id, run_id, caller_id)'). Distinct from the sibling deer-flow.agent.thread.v1 lifecycle event emitted immediately after on nervous-bus proper; this channel is emitted unversioned in code (schema filename adds the .v1 suffix per repo convention). Fire-and-forget — emit failures are logged and swallowed.

thread_id.description: Target thread the run belongs to.

caller_id.description: Caller identity from the X-Deer-Caller header or run metadata; 'unknown' if absent.

agent.description: Agent name from body.config.configurable.agent_name; 'unknown' if absent.
